payload.subject: Re: Parent & Baby Swim — Fall registration open
payload.body: hi — thanks for the heads up! we'd love to hold a spot for the saturday 9:30 am sessions. please let me know what's needed to confirm registration.

parsed.rationale: The event is a direct invitation to reply to hold a spot, so a short confirmation reply is the appropriate action — but confidence is moderate since no memory slice confirms the family's intent or the child's eligibility for the program.
